title: Public Health (Valuation List) Order 2026
text:
1950-07
Public Health
Subsidiary Legislation made under s. 294(4).
Public Health (Valuation List) Order 2026
LN.2026/075
Commencement 1.7.2026
_______________________
In exercise of the powers conferred on him by section 294(4) of the Public Health Act, the
Financial Secretary has made the following Order-
Title.
1. This Order may be cited as the Public Health (Valuation List) Order 2026.
Commencement.
2. This Order comes into operation on the 1 July 2026.
Net Annual value of dwelling houses for 2026.
3. The Financial Secretary has declared that the net annual value of hereditaments being
dwelling houses shall be estimated by comparison with the rents at which dwelling houses,
owned by Government, were let to members of the public on short term tenancies as at 1 July
2025 plus 3 per cent.
